signals.headline: Lakers Drop Key Regular Season Game to Mavericks as Injuries Mount, Impacting Playoff Seeding | NO | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Lakers Drop Key Regular Season Game to Mavericks as Injuries Mount, Impacting Playoff Seeding | NO | MED confidence**  
Cooper Flagg scored 45 points (following a 51-point game) to lead the Dallas Mavericks to a 134-128 victory over the injury-depleted Los Angeles Lakers on April 5, 2026, ending Dallas's 14-game home losing streak.[1][2][3][4][5]  
LeBron James recorded 30 points and 15 assists, b
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?
